items.value: Since this is your first time playing my game, you should take my quick tutorial! I made it so I can teach you how to play! Whaddya say? If you don't want to take it now, you can always try it later!
Play Hide-and-Seek with Baldi! Can you beat all the levels without losing?
<color=green>Continue your game of Hide-and-Seek with Baldi!</color>
Baldi won't bother you in this mode! Explore the Super Schoolhouse to your heart's content! You can explore any level you've reached in Hide-and-Seek.
Learn how to play Hide & Seek with Baldi!
Try your hand at one of Baldi's crazy challenges! (NOTE: These are old, but remain here for legacy purposes. New challenge maps will be added near the end of development.)
Collect as many notebooks as you can before Baldi tags you! Baldi speeds up over time, but notebooks slow him down!
Go on field trips, practice minigames, and try to set high scores!

Baldi's Basics Plus is currently in early access! There's still a lot of work to be done to the game, including:
Improved menus, dynamic music, horror elements, edutainment elements, and more content (Like levels, challenges, characters, etc).
<color=red> Expect bugs! If you encounter a bug, please report it with the link below.

<color=red>WARNING!</color>
Baldi's Basics Plus is a mild <color=red>horror game</color> and this is not educational software.

While horror elements are relatively light at this stage of the game's development, there are still a few jumpscares and other elements that might frighten some players.

PRESS {0} TO CONTINUE

Are you ready to leave?
<color=red>The items left on the counter will be lost!</color>
Play in a randomly generated level! You can enter a custom seed or have one randomly selected. You can also click on a high score to get the seed it used!

You've snuck in school after hours! Surely Principal of the Things will be after you. Use <color=red>dirty chalk erasers</color>, <color=red>lockers</color>, and your <color=red>map</color> to avoid being seen and collect 7 notebooks.
It's just you and Baldi in this challenge. The catch is, both of you move super fast! Can you think fast enough to collect 25 notebooks and escape the school?
Your legs might be broken, but thankfully you're equipped with an infinite use <color=red>grappling hook</color>! See if you can outwit Baldi and his friends when this is your only way to move!
Enjoy the great outdoors on a camping trip with Baldi and friends! Help Baldi keep a fire fueled in Campfire Frenzy, or grab a bite to eat in Pick-Quick-Nic.
The farm burned down! Don't worry though, reparations are in progress.
The farm field trip will return shortly! Baldi apologizes for the delay.
Now THAT'S a new high score!!!
Are you sure you want to quit?
<color=red>Warning!</color> Starting a new game will erase your existing save. Do you wish to continue?
Enter a new file name. You can enter up to eight letters.
That file name already exists! Enter a new name.
Enter a seed. Value can range from -2147483615 to 2147483615.
That seed isn't valid! Please enter a value ranging from -2147483615 to 2147483615.
Got high score #{0} with {1} notebooks in the Endless {2} map!
Got high score #{0} with {1} points in {2}!
Enter a new name and press CONFIRM when you're finished.
<color=red>Are you sure you want to delete this file? You will not be able to recover it!</color>
<color=red>D E L E T I N G</color>
<color=red>Are you sure you want to reset Endless Mode high scores?</color>
Endless Mode high scores have been reset.
<color=red>Are you sure you want to reset Field Trip high scores?</color>
Field Trip high scores have been reset.

Toggles between mouse and control
stick sensitivity settings.

Controls the speed
of turning the camera.

Controls the speed
that the cursor moves.

Reduces the intensity of certain visual effects
that may be uncomfortable for some players.

Enables directional captions for all
voice lines and important sound effects.

Toggle between full screen
and windowed modes.

Vsync will try to make the game match your monitor's
refresh rate, which can prevent issues like screen tearing.
If you are having performance issues however, turning
vsync off may allow for slightly better performance.

Filters menu screens so that pixels appear square
with minimal blurring on non-integer scale
screen resolutions.

Apply current graphics settings.
Unapplied settings will not be saved.

Experince Baldi's Basics like
it was really released in 1999!

This setting cannot be
changed during gameplay.

When enabled, controllers
will rumble for certain gameplay events.

<color=red>Reset all endless mode high
scores to their defaults.</color>

<color=red>Reset all field trip high
scores to their defaults.</color>

<color=red>This will permanently delete this file! Be absolutely
sure you want to do this before proceeding.</color>

Choose a play style. Changes only apply when starting a new game.
These options affect how many rounds you can lose before getting a game over!
Normal: You start each level with three power tubes.
Arcade: You start with three power tubes, but do not get any more each level.
Strict: You only get one power tube per-game. Lose once and that's game over!
Explorer: Baldi won't chase you, so you can explore freely!
(You cannot unlock anything or save in Explorer mode)

These settings change the game in ways to make it extra challenging!
Changes to these settings only apply when starting a new game.
Sets the time limit on every level to one minute. Hurry up!
Completely disables the map. Pay attention!
When using an item, you will lose a slot for the rest of the level. Think carefully!
What the?! This shouldn't be possible!

Energy Flavored Zesty Bar
Eat one of these and get a boost of energy!
Fills up your stamina more than you can just by taking a rest!

BSODA
Open a can of fizzed up BSODA and spray away anyone
who's trying to get in your way! Ingredients: Blue, high fructose corn syrup,
electricity, and 2% or less of: Water, blue 2.

Techno-Boots
Ol' Baldi's techno-boots have wheels on the bottom that will cancel out any outside forces,
so you won't get pushed around so much. No plugs required!

Principal's Keys
Break all the rules you want with the Principal's Keys! Use them to open any locked
door, even ones that haven't been locked by Principal of the Thing!

Grappling Hook
Fire this baby at a far away wall to quickly get pulled towards it.
Can get you out of sticky situations quick.

WD-NoSquee
Tired of noises giving your location away? WD-NoSquee can solve your problems!
Spray it anywhere to make everything around you squeakless clean.

Quarter
A shiny quarter!
Useful for anything that requires a shiny quarter!

Silly Door Lock
Use this lock on any wacky door to close it for a few seconds,
preventing anyone from coming through. Keep in mind that
people can still see through locked wacky doors!

Baldi's Least Favorite Tape
This tape was carefully designed by a student to effectively
deafen everyone as long as it plays. If you can hear the tone,
you can make all the noise you want, worry free!

An Apple for Baldi
Give this to Baldi and he won't be able to resist
taking a quick break to scarf it down!

Alarm Clock
Set this clock up and when it goes off, Baldi will want to check it out!
Unless he sees you of course, he's not *that* stupid.

Dirty Chalk Eraser
Create a cloud of chalk dust and block off the sight
of Baldi and his friends. Stand inside to hide, or use it to
sneak past characters without them seeing you.

Faculty Nametag
Experience what's it's like to work in Baldi's Super Schoolhouse!
When you have this on, no one will bother you!
Well, except for Baldi, he knows a fake nametag when he sees one.

Principal Whistle
Need instant justice? Blow this whistle and
Principal of the Thing will come to your aid as quickly as he can!

Safety Scissors
Slice through anything* with these high-end safety Scissors!
*Actually, these are the dullest scissors ever made and can only
cut through jumpropes, bubble gum, and cheap wires.

Dangerous Teleporter
Use this and there's no telling where you'll end up!
It could take you to safety or certain doom! Now that's what I call fun!

Portal Poster
If there's a room on the other side, place this on the wall to get through.
A super technology invented by Baldi himself!

Fill your map!
Buy this and your map will be completed instantly!
With this you can plan a route before even stepping foot in a level!

This isn't available yet!
I wonder what it could be for...

'Nana Peel
Drop this on the floor and anyone who walks over it will
slip around until they crash into a wall!
Be careful, you can slip on it too!

Diet BSODA
To help keep students healthy, the drink of choice here is
Diet BSODA! Made with 90% less fizz, Diet BSODA still has the
taste you love and might just be healthier too!

Bus Pass
You'll need one of these with you if you want to go on a field trip!
The green + is worth 25 You Thought Points!
The silver + is worth 50 You Thought Points!
The gold + is worth 100 You Thought Points!
The diamond + is worth 250 You Thought Points!

Lost Item
Looks like someone lost this! See if you can return it to
its rightful owner. You might be rewarded!

Shape Key
I bet this key could open a matching lock!

Invisibility Elixir
Drinking this elixir will turn its subject invisible for a little while!
Watch out though! Just because no one can see you
doesn't mean they can't still bump into you.

Super Stretchy Glove
Wearing this glove will temporarily turn your hand into a stretchy rubber!
This allows you to stretch your fingers and
reach any interactable object no matter how far away it is!

Glue Stick
Use this on a regular sticker slot to upgrade it to a sticky sticker slot!
Stickers placed on sticky sticker slots won't be lost when beating a level.

MORE Sticker Pack
Contains 7 randomly selected stickers.

Twin Pack
Contains 2 matching randomly selected stickers

Bonus Packet
Contains 1 randomly selected bonus sticker

Fresh Pack
Contains 2 randomly selected stickers not already in your inventory.
Will select one of the stickers you have least of
if you have at least one of every sticker.

Sticky Pack
Contains 1 randomly selected sticky sticker!
Sticky stickers won't be lost when beating a level,
even in a normal slot.
Place a sticker here for a cool effect!

Use a Packet-O-Matic or Safety Scissors to open this sticker packet.
Watch out, unopened sticker packets will be lost if you lose a round!
Adds another slot to the inventory.
Increases max stamina by 25% of the base value.
Increases reach distance by 100% of the base value.
Reduces the total number of out of order elevators by 1.

If applied when winning a level, 2 YTPs will
be rewarded for each second remaining.

If applied when winning a level, 5 YTPs will
be rewarded for each tile between the player
and Baldi using the shortest possible path.

If applied when winning a level, 1 YTP will
be rewarded for each tile discovered on the map.
0 YTPs will be rewarded if the map has been purchased.

If applied when winning a level, 10 YTPs will
be rewarded for each unapplied sticker the player has.
Multiplies all earned You Thought Points by an additional 25%.

NPCs will not see you unless you are within their
line of sight for a consecutive 0.5 seconds.
Adds a 12.5% chance that a sound you make will not be heard.
Multiplies the map discovery range by 2.
Get a forecast of upcoming random events and when they will start.

Causes a safe room that Baldi cannot enter to generate
somewhere in the level. Must be applied before exploring
a level for the first time in a run to take effect.
Cannot be removed if the current level has already been generated.

Causes Johnny's Store to generate
somewhere in the level. Must be applied before exploring
a level for the first time in a run to take effect.
Cannot be removed if the current level has already been generated.

Increases the time Baldi stops to praise you for
successfully completing an activity by 3 seconds.

Increases the time it takes Baldi to count down
each number at the beginning of a round by 1 second.

Remain hidden for an additional 3 seconds when
you leave a condition that hides you.
Most doors will stay open for an additional 10 seconds.

Use this on a regular sticker slot to upgrade it to a sticky sticker slot!
Stickers placed on sticky sticker slots won't be lost when beating a level.
I HEAR EVERY DOOR YOU OPEN
I GET ANGRIER FOR EVERY PROBLEM YOU GET WRONG
I can't remember what this one is supposed to say...

When you follow the
school rules:
1. No running
2. No entering faculty
only rooms
3. No bullying
4. No drinking
5. No escaping
detention
6. No fourth wall breaks

Here's a tip!
You can put items in storage lockers for safe keeping!

Here's a tip!
You can see how many notebooks you need on the top left corner of your screen!

Here's a tip!
You can't run when you're out of stamina. Stand still to refill!

Here's a tip!
You can change the controls and more in the options menu at any time by pausing!

Here's a tip!
If you successfully complete an activity, you'll win some You Thought Points!

Here's a tip!
The map can show you when there are still items and notebooks in rooms!

Here's a tip!
Short on cash? Sometimes, Johnny might lend you a hand!

Here's a tip!
You Thought Points are often called "YTPs" for short!

Here's a tip!
My friends won't notice you through windows!

Here's a tip!
My face appears at the bottom right corner of your screen when I hear a noise!

Here's a tip!
You can hide from me in dark spots!

Here's a tip!
Some rooms have cool effects! For example, the playground refills stamina faster!

Here's a tip!
You'll find posters about my friends in the principal's office!

Here's a tip!
Return to activities after collecting all the notebooks for a cool bonus!

Here's a tip!
I won't tag you while I'm congratulating you on successfully completing an activity!

Here's a tip!
If a Math Machine balloon pops, it will reappear somewhere else in the room!
What do you do when the school opens in 7 hours and you haven't hired a janitor? Hire a broom! It sweeps everything!
Tries to impress others by blowing bubble gum bubbles, but usually just ends up spitting them out.
Some kid drew this face and next thing you know it's floating around, laughing and making mischief.
truly the sock puppet of all time, I will not explain his mechanics whatsoever.
A cloud who loves being a cloud doing cloudy things. Floats around and blows strong winds down halls.
Hops around in her high-heeled shoe inviting students to her class. Make sure you're not late! Or else!
"If I see anyone breaking the school rules, I'll make sure justice is served! It tastes good and fills my tummy!"
Won 1st Prize at the Science Fair! Loves hugging people, rushing towards anyone it sees. Sadly, it turns super slowly.
A strange result of a quantum-tastic test! Observing this thing will affect time in strange ways. Don't stare too much though!
A cheap doctor who employs a unique reflex testing method to diagnose students. Don't leave until the test is finished!
Janitors must wear boots when sweeping!
WD-NoSquee! When your doors are too loud and you need 'em to be  QUIET!
Count the balloons! How many of each color can you find? Go, do it!

Students:
Please refrain from using the phone while Professor Baldi is in the building.

It causes him to forget what he was doing and prevents him from hearing.

Hey kids!
Safety scissors are great for cutting:
Paper
Jumpropes
Robots
Homework
ATTENTION! Due to unkown reasons that have absolutely nothing to do with game design, school faculty cannot currently see through windows. Please understand. Hi.

Please
read the posters. They are here to help you.

You are currently in the



zone!!!!!!!!
Go see Baldi in his office for some tips!

Is it lunch
time yet? I'm hungry!
Are you confused? You'll figure it out!
Don't play so long you starve!
An apple a day saves lives.
You can't hide from me! Haha!

Today's lesson:
How to eat Cheese
The world is big. Class dismissed.
Solve the math problem displayed on the machine. Then pick up the balloon in the shape of the correct answer and insert it into the machine!
Pop the balloons until only the number displayed on the machine remains, and then pull the lever!
Click each "?" balloon to reveal what it is, then find the match! Watch out, once a "?" turns into "!", it's your last chance to match it!
<color=red>Do not review the updated contracts!</color> They are fine.
If the computer doesn't turn on, try jiggling the switch.
Hey kid, you aren't supposed to be in here!!!

How to get fired:
FAIL
FAIL
FAIL
FAIL

Budget overview:
$1,000 - Textbooks
$18.99 - Computers
$500 - Salaries
$10,000 - Repairs
$3,497 - Push pins
$1,000,000 - Air
$0.04 - Staff Training
$123 - More push pins
Surprise! Everyone gets to wear a Hawaiian shirt to work next week while I'm on a vacation in Hawaii! This is my way of thanking all my employees for their hard work!
Howdy li'l boy! I'm Baldiman, and I can invent
Can you invent toe nail clippers?
That looks like a jackhammer with a rusty knife glued on...
Oh yes! It will surely cut off your toes!
Okay cool thanks bye mister I'm leaving.

Who needs hair anyways?

I don't.
In fact, all hair should be
You didn't get a high score this time. Try again!
You lost... No items for you!
Be quick to pick a bite to eat before Baldi's appetite gets the better of him! Don't take his favorite food though!
I'm stuffed! You are too? Great, now we're ready for a hike!
I'm stuffed! You're still hungry? But we just ate a big lunch!
Are you hungry? Because I am! Let's play Pick-Quick-Nic!

Covered plates will be placed onto the picnic table.
Be patient and wait for them to be opened!
You'll get a strike if you click on a covered plate.

While you're waiting, take a look at the foods I'm thinking of.
I'm really looking forward to eating these foods, so pay attention to them!
The covers have lifted! Dinner is served!

When the covers are lifted, quickly grab a food that I am NOT thinking of!
Whatever you click on is the food YOU'RE eating, NOT ME!

For example, to win this round, you could click on
the apple, the chicken leg, or the hot dog.

Be quick though! If you take too long, I might just
grab everything on the table without thinking and you'll miss out
and get a strike. Sorry about that!

If you click on one of the foods I AM thinking of,
that will make me sad, and you'll get a strike!
Oh no, I wanted the hamburger!

That no-good bully likes to pull pranks,
so sometimes he'll sneak a few bombs into our meal!

When this happens, click the bombs to knock them away,
and be sure to do it before grabbing some food!

If I see you've already eaten, I'll just grab everything on the table and...
Whoops! That's another strike! Get three and that's game over!
Watch out! Some rounds are very tricky!
Keep the fire roaring by launching fuel into it. Watch out though, not all fuel is good for the fire!
Wow, this fire will keep us warm all night! Way to go!
Oh no! No fire means no s'mores! Better luck next time.
What a beautiful fire! Let's make sure it doesn't go out by playing Campfire Frenzy!

Some fuel will be tossed into First Prize's hands.
That log will be great for the fire!

Once First Prize has some fuel in hand,
use the action button to launch it towards the fire.

Not everything First Prize catches is good for the fire!
If First Prize catches bad fuel, wait until something good replaces it.

If you make a mistake, the fire will weaken a little bit...
Brr, it's getting cold!

If you add enough fuel without making any mistakes though,
that fire will brighten up again!
If the fire goes out, that's game over!
Pay attention! Things can get pretty crazy!
Oh, hi! Let's play hide and seek!
Wait! You don't have a bus pass.
You'll need one if you want to go on a field trip.
Ready or not, here I come!
Thanks for playing, come back soon!
I can't believe it! You're incredible!
Woah, I think you might be smarter than me!
Oh, hi! Welcome to my schoolhouse!
Now all you need to do is...
Find a way out before I catch you!
Looks like the leak is leaking again.
Uh oh. Looks like my fog machine is malfunctioning again.
I- I can barely see anything!
Surely my newest invention must have been a grand success!
Hey! A mystery room has appeared.
Party at the Principal's office! Everyone's invited!
Come on in and get a special prize!
Attention! Attention everyone! Test procedure is imminent!
We run regular tests on our super doors to make sure students can't leave before their class is over.
Some of my old-fashioned boulder traps have malfunctioned!
If you get squished by a balder, don't sweat it!
You'll spring back to normal size in no time!
The open house is about to begin!
Things are about to get crowded!
Class dismissed! School is no longer in session!
Better wrap things up soon, or else I'm gonna fiiiiind yoooooou!
Some notebooks are locked behind tricky activities
such as this one, my Math Machine!
If you want to get these notebooks, you'll have to solve the activity first!
To complete this activity, first you'll need to
solve the math problem displayed on the front of the machine.
use the action button to pick up the balloon in the shape of correct number
and put it in the Math Machine!
Once you submit an answer, the notebook will appear!
Looks like you got that problem wrong.
Don't worry, you can still get the notebook,
but when you're playing my game, getting problems wrong will make it harder!
Congratulations! You found all the notebooks!
Once you've found all the notebooks in a level
you can finish by leaving through one of the elevators.
When you're playing my game, you'll get to meet all my friends!
They all like to do their own thing.
For example, if the principal sees you breaking a school rule, he'll  send you to detention!
Don't tell him I told you this, but here in the Super Schoolhouse
it can be FUN to break the school rules!
For example, you can find some really cool items in the faculty only rooms.
When you're ready to meet the principal, press this big button.
Then, watch what happens when you break a school rule in front of him!
Wasn't that crazy? Every one of my friends does something different,
so when you're playing my game, pay attention, so you'll remember what makes everyone unique!
Now you surely know all about how to play my game!
The tutorial is almost over, but this is where the fun begins!
Once you leave this room, we'll begin a game of hide and seek.
I'll count down from ten, and then start seeking you.
Meanwhile, you'll have to go find the rest of the notebooks.
Try doing that without letting me taaaag you.
It will surely be harder than you think!
You can interact with all sorts of things around my Super Schoolhouse!
If you want to interact with something, all you have to do is look at it and press the "ACTION" button.
Why don't you try it right now by opening this door?
Oh, hi! Welcome to the tutorial!
Here, I'll teach you everything you'll need to know about how to play my game!
To move around, you'll need to use the "MOVE" and "LOOK" buttons.
You can see them on the chalk boards behind me!
In this tutorial, all the buttons you'll need to press will be shown on these chalk boards,
so be sure to read them!
To continue, turn around and walk into the next room.
Did you see that? Sodas can push stuff around!
Every item does something different, so be sure to learn what they all do.
Go into the next room to continue the tutorial.
While you're exploring my Super Schoolhouse you'll find all sorts of useful items!
To pick up an item, just look at it and press the "ACTION" button.
Then it will be added to your inventory.
To use an item, select it with the "ITEM SELECTION" buttons, and when it's highlighted,
press the "USE ITEM" button. It's that easy!
Every item does something different, so let's try a few.
Grab this quarter and use it on the vending machine to get a soda.
Now, spray that soda at me and watch what happens.
Uh oh! Looks like you'll need to find a button to open this door!
Would you look at that! The door's open now! Good job!
Go into the next room to continue the tutorial.
Pressing the "LOOK BEHIND YOU" button, to get a look behind you, can be super useful!
I think the button is at the end of this maze. Good thing you have a map!
Your map automatically fills out as you explore, so you won't get lost in there.
Press and hold the "QUICK MAP" button to quickly view a map of the surrounding aaarea!
Press the "ADVANCED MAP" button to view the entire map on your You Can Think Pad.
There you can zoom in and out, scroll around, and place markers to keep track of cool stuff.
It's pretty cool! Go on, I'm sure you can find that button!
You did it! Hit the button and then hop into this vent.
It's a little shortcut I built.
When you do things that make noises, I'll hear them
and I'll use those noises to find you.
When we're playing hide and seek you'll have to try to be quiet if you want to win.
Walk into the next room to continue the tutorial.
Go into the next room to continue the tutorial.
The goal of my game is to find all the notebooks in each level!
You'll find notebooks in classrooms like this one.
To collect a notebook, just look at it and press the "ACTION" button.
To continue, grab that notebook and then step into the next room!
It's good to walk, but it's fun to run! To go faster, press and hold the "RUN" button while you move.
Just make sure you don't run out of stamina. If you do run out of stamina, don't worry!
Just stand still and catch your breath. Your stamina will fill back up in no time.
To continue, you'll have to get past this conveyor belt.
If you walk, you won't be fast enough, so run and you'll make it!
Well this looks like one tricky situation!
You'll never be able to get across this conveyor belt by yourself, but I have an idea!
Just grab some of these You Thought Points with the "ACTION" button and then head into Johnny's store.
He'll surely have an item you can buy that will help you out!
Hey! While you're here, why don't you buy some stickers?
They can change the game in fun ways!
Now that you've got some stickers, go use that machine with the glove.
You can use it to apply the stickers to the back of your You Can Think Pad!
All riiiight! Now the effects of the stickers you applied have been activated!
Applied stickers will last until you beat a level, so use them wisely.
In the real game that means you would have lost, but since this is just the tutorial, I'll let you go.
Bring the animal that makes this sound to the barn!
Farmer needs our help to get the animals in the barn!
I'll tell you what animal we need.
Then you'll need to find all the matching animals and bring them to the barn.
Just click on an animal to pick it up. Then move it through the maze and into the barn!
Wow! Fantastic! The farmer gave you these items as thanks!
Take a look around, and enjoy the fresh air.
I've already started the fire, but if you want, you can help me keep it going
you can head over to the picnic tables, and we can get a bite to eat!
If you need to learn how to play a minigame, just click on meee!
Once you're ready to start a minigame, find the nearby clickable object.
If you win a minigame, you can pick three items to bring back.
No being in school after-hours in the halls!
No drinking drinks in the halls!
No eating food in the halls!
No escaping detention in the halls!
No entering faculty only rooms in the halls!
No looking in other people's lockers in the halls!
No stabbing people with unused dialogue in the halls!
Your parents will hear about this one!
Don't make me do this again!
Say, who's lookin' to see a neat trick?
One, two, buckle my shoe. Three, four, I've got gum for you!
Does anyone wanna see somethin' cool?
I skip all day, I say-I say, I skip to push the pain away!
Hooka, a-chew, I'mma chewin' mah gum.
Booka, a-too, it's tons o' fum... Er, fun!
Psst! Don't let the grownups spot this.
Watch the pro go to work!
Feast your eyes while I feast on mah gum!
Huh, so maybe that's why they held me back.
Hippity hey, look at the time; I need to fetch some more rhyme.
Skip away, skip away, it'll go away.
I'll be sent to the guy of the Thing, smacking my head 'n' causing a ring!
Time to bounce, time to flee, before they throw the book at me!
They're gonna be so mad at me, I'm so sorry!
Wow! That's great! Let's play again... Sometime soon!

Time to jump rope!
Press {0} to jump!
What?! No Items? No items, no pass...
I'll take that! It's mine now...
I AM COMING READY OR NOR HERE I COME
I HAVE BEEN PROGRAMMED TO DESIRE YOUR IMAGE
I HAVE LOST YOU - I DON'T LIKE THAT
I HUG PEOPLE FOR ALL ETERNITY
Check your map to see where my class is.
Just reminding you to be at my class in
WHYYYYYYY WEREN'T YOU AT MY CLAAAAAAASSS?!?!?!
Thank you! Now I might not starve!
Thank you! My parents would have been so proud that I made a sale.
Thanks, I hated that item anyways!
I didn't really want food today anyways...
Alright, I'll take care of it.
You're my favorite customer. See ya!
You can expel someone for the rest of your game!
This will fill out your map for the next level.
This will fill out your map.
No way you'll get lost now!
